prologue.quote: To think is to forget differences, to generalize, to abstract.
prologue.instruction: Click any number 1–10 you see during the next 90 seconds.

questions.r2: What theme runs through all the scenes?
questions.r3: If scene 5 had been different, would the meaning of the whole change?

prompts.miras_retention: You are a memory with a fixed budget of 280 tokens...
prompts.judge: You have witnessed a trial between two memories...
